size.desc: Size in CSS units, including unit name or standard size name (xs|sm|md|lg|xl)

model-value.desc: Model of the component; Either use this property (along with a listener for 'update:model-value' event) OR use v-model directive

options.desc: Array of objects that the binary components will be created from. For best performance reference a variable in your scope. Canonical form of each object is with 'label' (String), 'value' (Any) and optional 'disable' (Boolean) props (can be customized with options-value/option-label/option-disable props) along with any other props from QToggle, QCheckbox, or QRadio.

...props.desc: Any other props from QToggle, QCheckbox, or QRadio

examples: [ { label: 'Option 1', value: 'op1' }, { label: 'Option 2', value: 'op2' }, { label: 'Option 3', value: 'op3', disable: true } ]

option-value.desc: Property of option which holds the 'value'; If using a function then for best performance, reference it from your scope and do not define it inline

option-label.desc: Property of option which holds the 'label'; If using a function then for best performance, reference it from your scope and do not define it inline

option-disable.desc: Property of option which tells it's disabled; The value of the property must be a Boolean; If using a function then for best performance, reference it from your scope and do not define it inline

returns.desc: If true, the current option will be disabled

name.desc: Used to specify the name of the controls; Useful if dealing with forms submitted directly to a URL

type.desc: The type of input component to be used

color.desc: Color name for component from the Quasar Color Palette

keep-color.desc: Should the color (if specified any) be kept when input components are unticked?

dark.desc: Notify the component that the background is a dark color

left-label.desc: Label (if any specified) should be displayed on the left side of the input components

inline.desc: Show input components as inline-block rather than each having their own row

...self.desc: The corresponding option entry from the 'options' prop

label.desc: Label to display along the component

value.desc: Value of the option that will be used by the component model

disable.desc: If true, the option will be disabled

...props.desc: Any other props from QToggle, QCheckbox, or QRadio

label-[name].desc: Slot to define the specific label for the option at '[name]' where name is a 0-based index; Overrides the generic 'label' slot if used

...self.desc: The corresponding option entry from the 'options' prop

label.desc: Label to display along the component

value.desc: Value of the option that will be used by the component model

disable.desc: If true, the option will be disabled

...props.desc: Any other props from QToggle, QCheckbox, or QRadio

update:model-value.desc: Emitted when the component needs to change the model; Is also used by v-model
